creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
eadler      2011-09-20 01:24:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/axis2            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Apache Axis2 is a Web Services / SOAP / WSDL engine, the successor to the
  widely used Apache Axis SOAP stack. There are two implementations of the Apache
  Axis2 Web services engine - Apache Axis2/Java and Apache Axis2/C
  
  WWW: http://axis.apache.org/axis2/java/core/
  
  PR:             ports/159269
  Reviewed by:    glewis
  Submitted by:   Jason Helfman <jhelfman@e-e.com>
  Approved by:    bapt (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2978    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +64 -0     ports/www/axis2/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/axis2/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/axis2/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +212 -0    ports/www/axis2/pkg-plist (new)
